steps.expected: All state change events (TensionCreated, RealityConfronted, DesireRevised, TensionResolved, TensionReleased, StructureChanged) defined with correct payloads
steps.observed: All 6 state change event types are defined with correct payload structure (tension_id, desired/actual/old/new fields, timestamps)

steps.action: Run store tests for event emission
steps.expected: Store operations emit correct events
steps.observed: test_store_emits_tension_created_event, test_store_emits_reality_confronted_event, test_store_emits_desire_revised_event, test_store_emits_tension_resolved_event, test_store_emits_tension_released_event, test_store_emits_structure_changed_event all pass

steps.expected: All dynamic transition events (ConflictDetected, ConflictResolved, LifecycleTransition, OscillationDetected, ResolutionAchieved, NeglectDetected, OrientationShift) defined with correct payloads
steps.observed: All 7 dynamic transition event types are defined with correct payload structure

steps.action: Run engine tests for dynamic event emission
steps.expected: DynamicsEngine emits conflict, oscillation, and lifecycle transition events
steps.observed: test_engine_emits_conflict_detected, test_engine_tracks_conflict_resolution, test_engine_emits_oscillation_detected, test_engine_emits_lifecycle_transition all pass

steps.expected: subscribe() returns SubscriptionHandle, dropping handle stops delivery
steps.observed: Handle returned, events received before drop, no events after drop

steps.expected: Multiple subscribers receive identical event sequences
steps.observed: Both subscribers received all emitted events

steps.expected: Events emitted in causal order: creation -> modification -> conflict detection
steps.observed: TensionCreated received first, RealityConfronted second, ConflictDetected third

steps.expected: Store events in correct sequence: created -> reality update -> desire update -> resolved
steps.observed: Integration test confirms correct causal ordering through full lifecycle

steps.expected: Same initial state + same operation sequence produces identical event sequence
steps.observed: Two EventBus instances receiving same event sequence show identical history

steps.expected: Multiple subscribers receive events in identical order
steps.observed: Event sequences match across subscribers

steps.expected: Failed operations (validation errors, invalid transitions) emit zero events
steps.observed: No events recorded when store operations fail validation

steps.expected: Failed updates do not produce events
steps.observed: test_error_recovery_constraint_violations confirms no partial events on failure

steps.expected: All event payloads contain documented fields with correct types
steps.observed: tension_id is ULID string, timestamps are chrono DateTime, enums are valid variants

steps.expected: All 13 event types are defined and serializable
steps.observed: 13 event types defined, all serialize/deserialize correctly

steps.expected: Unicode content preserved in payloads
steps.observed: CJK, emoji, RTL text survives roundtrip through event payload

steps.expected: Complete event sequence enables reconstruction of current tension store state
steps.observed: Replaying mutations from event history reproduces current tension values

steps.expected: replay_mutations() returns tension matching current state
steps.observed: Reconstructed tension id, desired, actual, parent_id, status match original

assertions.title: No duplicate events on stable state

steps.expected: Querying dynamics on unchanged state does not emit duplicate events
steps.observed: Events only fire on state transitions, not on repeated queries

steps.expected: One subscriber panicking does not prevent other subscribers from receiving events
steps.observed: Good subscriber received event despite panicking subscriber

steps.expected: Panicking subscriber is removed from subscriber list
steps.observed: Subscriber count drops from 1 to 0 after panic

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 10 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All events assertions validated through cargo test execution. 60 total tests passed across events module (22), engine module (7), store module (13), and integration tests (18).
